title: Add status update with resolution/progress detail notes

requirements.text: Extend the backend complaint data model to include a `statusLog` array on each complaint record. Each entry in `statusLog` should store: `status` (text: 'Pending', 'In Progress', or 'Resolved'), `updatedAt` (timestamp in nanoseconds), `updatedBy` (text, staff/admin name), and `details` (text, description of progress or resolution). Expose a new backend function `updateComplaintStatus(complaintNumber, newStatus, updatedBy, details)` that appends a new entry to the complaint's `statusLog` and updates the complaint's current `status` field. Update `migration.mo` to add an empty `statusLog` field to all existing complaint records.

quotes: add status update detail in app
In Progress और Resolved आप्सन काम कर सके
allow recording resolution/progress details when a complaint status is changed to 'In Progress' or 'Resolved'

acceptanceCriteria: The complaint data model includes a `statusLog` array field.
`updateComplaintStatus` appends a new log entry and updates the complaint's current status.
Migration adds an empty `statusLog` array to all pre-existing complaint records.
Calling `updateComplaintStatus` with status 'In Progress' or 'Resolved' along with detail text persists correctly.

requirements.text: On the Complaint Detail page (admin view only), add an 'Update Status' section. This section should show a form with: a Status dropdown ('Pending', 'In Progress', 'Resolved'), an 'Updated By' text field (staff/admin name), and a 'Details / Remarks' textarea for recording progress or resolution notes. Include an 'Update Status' submit button that calls the `updateComplaintStatus` backend function and refreshes the complaint data. Below the form, display the full `statusLog` history in a table with columns: Status, Updated By, Date & Time, and Details — ordered from newest to oldest. This section should only be visible to admin-role users.

quotes: add status update detail in app
In Progress और Resolved आप्सन काम कर सके
allow recording resolution/progress details when a complaint status is changed to 'In Progress' or 'Resolved'

acceptanceCriteria: The 'Update Status' section is visible only to admin-role users on the Complaint Detail page.
The form includes a Status dropdown with options: Pending, In Progress, Resolved.
The form includes an 'Updated By' text field and a 'Details / Remarks' textarea.
Submitting the form calls `updateComplaintStatus` with the correct arguments.
After a successful update, the complaint's current status badge on the page reflects the new status.
The status log history table displays all past status entries with Status, Updated By, Date & Time, and Details columns.
The status log entries are ordered from newest to oldest.

constraints: Admin-only: the Update Status form and status log history must not be shown to non-admin (user-role) users.
Do not modify any files under frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, or frontend/src/components/ui.
Preserve all existing complaint fields and backend functions; only extend, do not break existing behavior.
nonGoals: Sending external SMS/email notifications on status change.
Allowing regular (non-admin) users to update complaint status.
Changing the existing attendance recording feature.
